name: Entrepreneurship & Startups
student_summary: Start and grow your own venture — build something from nothing.
overview: Start and grow your own venture — build something from nothing. Entrepreneurship & Startups sits in the Management & Strategy family of Business, Finance & Economics. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You naturally step up when a group needs direction
who_should_avoid: You want a short, easy study path — this one demands years of serious preparation
Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Apply opportunity spotting to real problems
Collaborate with your team using sales
Keep improving at fundraising — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: Adaptive — mix analysis, action and people skills as the situation demands
alternative_paths: Professional exams (CA/CS/CMA) without a specific degree
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Strong earning ceiling (₹100 LPA+ at senior levels)
A broad Management & Strategy foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
A long, demanding preparation and learning curve
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Entrepreneurship & Startups is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of sales
projects: Beginner: explore opportunity spotting with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using No-code tools
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Product Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Digital Marketing: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Business Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Entrepreneurship & Startups pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹0 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹100 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Business Studies, Economics. Typical degrees: Any degree, BBA. Alternatives exist: professional exams (ca/cs/cma) without a specific degree.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Entrepreneurship & Startups evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Entrepreneurship & Startups is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
